text:
Created attachment 173739
call setlocale()

setenv LC_ALL de_DE.ISO8859-1


With patch
% /usr/obj/usr/src/bin/domainname/domainname foo
domainname: setdomainname: Operation nicht erlaubt


Without patch
% domainname foo
domainname: setdomainname: Operation not permitted
